regulation_name: Act against Unjustifiable Premiums and Misleading Representations
citation: Act against Unjustifiable Premiums — Section 5 (Comparative representations)
summary: Comparative and superiority representations must be substantiated and must not mislead consumers.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: No.1, best, versus competitor, or superiority claims. ACTION: WARN — require objective evidence. CHECK: Survey methodology, sample, and comparison date. ESCALATE IF: Unsubstantiated No.1 or misleading comparison.
